join_order.probe: num(filtered: uom=USD, ddate in 2023, value IS NOT NULL)
join_order.notes: P11: pre_triple_hash already mmap'd — zero runtime build cost. Anti-join: probe (adsh_code, tag_code, ver_code); if NOT FOUND (empty slot encountered) → row has no matching pre row → include in aggregation. C24: bounded probing, probe < pth_cap. 512 MB index prefetched via MADV_WILLNEED before scan begins.

filters.notes: Load uom_dict.txt at runtime; find usd_code for 'USD'. C2: never hardcode.
Raw int32_t YYYYMMDD compare. C1 exemption: this column is NOT epoch days — do NOT use date_utils.h.
NaN sentinel check for value IS NOT NULL.

data_structures.anti_join_index: pre_built_mmap(pre_triple_hash, cap=33554432, mask=33554431, slot=PreTripleSlot{adsh_code:int32_t, tag_code:int32_t, ver_code:int32_t, row_id:int32_t}, empty_sentinel=INT32_MIN, C20: use std::fill not memset for any runtime structures)
data_structures.aggregation: compact_hash_map(thread_local, cap=16384, key=uint64_t packed ((uint64_t)(uint32_t)tag_code << 32 | (uint32_t)ver_code), value={count:int64_t, sum_cents:int64_t}, slot_size=24_bytes, total_mem=16384*24*64_threads=24MB<L3_44MB)

prefetch.pre_triple_hash: madvise(pre_raw, pre_sz=536870916, MADV_WILLNEED) at start of data_loading phase BEFORE num scan begins — 512 MB critical to overlap I/O with num column loads
prefetch.num_columns: madvise uom.bin, ddate.bin, value.bin, adsh.bin, tag.bin, version.bin with MADV_WILLNEED in data_loading phase

indexes.header_parse: C32: declare pth_cap, pth_mask, pth_ht at function scope before any parallel region

aggregation_details.key_constraint: C15: key MUST encode BOTH tag_code AND ver_code — GROUP BY requires both dimensions
aggregation_details.cap_derivation: next_pow2(5000 * 2) = 16384, sized for estimated ~5000 groups (P23: filtered count, not raw)
aggregation_details.sum_constraint: C29 HARD: accumulate int64_t cents via llround(value * 100.0); NO double/Kahan accumulator
aggregation_details.merge_strategy: P17: after morsel scan completes, each thread emits its occupied slots; merge into global hash map sequentially — ~5000 groups per thread, 64 threads, trivial merge cost

parallelism.notes: P20: thread-local aggregation is default to avoid contention. Each thread holds its own hash map (cap=16384, ~384KB). After scan, merge all thread-local maps into final global map.

output.order_by_notes: C33: secondary tiebreakers tag_code ASC, ver_code ASC for deterministic TOP-N output
output.topk_strategy: std::partial_sort on result vector after HAVING filter (P6: O(n log k))

encoding.tag: C31: printf("\"%s\"", tag_dict[tag_code].c_str()) — defensive quoting, load sf3.gendb/shared/tag_dict.txt
encoding.version: C31: printf("\"%s\"", version_dict[ver_code].c_str()) — defensive quoting, load sf3.gendb/shared/version_dict.txt
encoding.total: C29: int64_t sc = sum_cents; printf("%lld.%02lld", (long long)(sc/100), (long long)std::abs(sc%100))

correctness_checklist.C2: Load uom_dict.txt at runtime for usd_code
correctness_checklist.C15: GROUP BY key encodes BOTH tag_code and ver_code
correctness_checklist.C20: No memset for multi-byte sentinels; use std::fill for runtime hash map init
correctness_checklist.C24: Bounded probe loop: for (uint32_t probe = 0; probe < pth_cap; probe++)
correctness_checklist.C29: SUM as int64_t cents — HARD CONSTRAINT, no double accumulator
correctness_checklist.C32: pth_cap, pth_mask, pth_ht declared at function scope before parallel region
correctness_checklist.C33: Tiebreaker: tag_code ASC, ver_code ASC appended to sort comparator
